blockers.message: Profitability, strategy, optimizer, and convergence evidence maturity is not sufficient for live review or scale-up.

The Upbit PAPER candidate scorecard is now dashboard-visible, but OOS, walk-forward, bootstrap, concentration, and repeated-window evidence are still missing; it remains PAPER review only and cannot create live readiness.
Candidate scorecard ranking now requires OOS, walk-forward, and bootstrap source evidence ids; generic evidence count is insufficient and remains blocked for live review.

notes: Rechecked in MVP-4. Profitability evidence maturity now carries explicit promotion threshold evidence for replay trades, OOS/walk-forward coverage, paper trades, paper runtime hours, shadow opportunities, net EV after cost, profit factor, drawdown, fill quality, paper/live parity, and open HIGH contract gaps. The gap remains OPEN and live-blocking.
